scripts.load:01_node_capacity_limit:baseline:str: set -a && . load/.env && set +a && mkdir -p load/scenarios/01_node_capacity_limit/baseline/results && TESTID=${K6_TESTID:-$(node -e 'console.log(crypto.randomUUID())')} && echo "k6 testid: ${TESTID}" && K6_TESTID=${TESTID} K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_SERVER_URL=${K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_SERVER_URL:-${PROMETHEUS_URL%/}/api/v1/write} K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_TREND_STATS="${K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_TREND_STATS:-p(95),p(99),avg,min,max}" k6 run --tag testid="${TESTID}" --log-output=none -o experimental-prometheus-rw load/scenarios/01_node_capacity_limit/baseline/stress.k6.ts
